details.test: Task 1: Submit website redesign quote request for 12 pages with $8,000 budget
Task 2: Choose cheapest monthly maintenance plan with >=10 support hours and start onboarding
Task 3: Save ecommerce case study with >=20% conversion uplift to shortlist and reopen
Task 4: Save 2023 SaaS onboarding UX article to reading list and reopen
Task 5: Create and save mobile app + website estimate at or under $25,000
Task 6: Book 30-minute discovery call on a Wednesday morning using scheduler
Task 7: Configure hourly UX research engagement under $200/hour for ~80 hours and send inquiry
Task 8: Select branding package under $5,000 with >=3 logo concepts and brand guidelines and start onboarding
